_readme: IMAGE PROMPT LIBRARY - shared across all VRA gateway sites
This file is identical in every site repo. Edit master, then propagate to sites.
DO NOT edit per-site. Changes here improve all sites on next image regeneration.
suffix: appended to every prompt automatically.
No emoji or special characters in this file.
suffix: Photorealistic DSLR photography style. No text overlays, no logos, no UI mockups, no watermarks, no stock photo cliches.
heroSuffix: Landscape hero banner composition with generous negative space on one side for headline text overlay. Shallow depth of field.
breakSuffix: Editorial supporting image. Clean composition, professional atmosphere.

doctor-surgery.label: Doctor surgery / GP clinic
doctor-surgery.hero: Attractive adult female doctor aged 35-45, wearing a subtle Bluetooth headset, seated at a desktop workstation in a modern Australian GP clinic, reviewing clinical notes on screen while dictating, softly blurred clinic corridor and waiting room in background, warm natural window light, confident and professional expression.
doctor-surgery.break: Clean modern GP surgery administration desk with laptop, Bluetooth headset resting beside it, patient chart folder open, warm natural window light, no people, tidy clinical environment.
doctor-surgery.altHero: Doctor dictating patient notes using voice recognition software in a modern Australian GP clinic
doctor-surgery.altBreak: Modern Australian GP clinic administration desk with voice recognition headset

hospital-office.label: Hospital specialist / clinical office
hospital-office.hero: Attractive adult male specialist doctor aged 40-50, standing at a height-adjustable workstation in a modern hospital office, dictating into a headset microphone while reviewing imaging on a large monitor, busy hospital corridor softly blurred behind glass partition, strong clinical daylight, authoritative and focused expression.
hospital-office.break: Modern hospital specialist office, clean desk with large monitor, compact desktop microphone visible, no people, clinical lighting, depth of field.
hospital-office.altHero: Hospital specialist dictating clinical notes with speech recognition software in an Australian hospital
hospital-office.altBreak: Modern Australian hospital specialist office with clinical workstation and microphone

lawyer-office.label: Lawyer / legal office
lawyer-office.hero: Attractive adult female lawyer aged 35-45, elegant business attire, seated at a large desk in a high-rise legal office, dictating into a compact desktop microphone while reviewing legal documents on screen, city skyline softly blurred through floor-to-ceiling windows, warm backlighting, calm and authoritative expression.
lawyer-office.break: Modern Australian law firm office interior, tidy desk with legal briefs, laptop, and small digital recorder, city view through large windows, warm afternoon light, no people.
lawyer-office.altHero: Australian lawyer using voice dictation software to draft legal documents in a city law office
lawyer-office.altBreak: Modern Australian law firm office desk with digital dictation recorder and legal documents

legal-team.label: Legal team / law firm meeting
legal-team.hero: Small team of adult legal professionals aged 30-50 in a modern Australian law firm meeting room, one person dictating while others review a shared document on a large screen, collaborative and focused atmosphere, city skyline visible through windows, warm professional lighting.
legal-team.break: Modern Australian law firm meeting room, long table with laptops and legal briefs, city view, soft even lighting, no people.
legal-team.altHero: Legal team collaborating on document drafting using voice recognition in an Australian law firm
legal-team.altBreak: Modern Australian law firm meeting room with city views

office-general.label: General modern office / corporate
office-general.hero: Attractive adult professional aged 35-45, seated at an ergonomic workstation in a clean modern open-plan Australian office, speaking into a compact desktop microphone while reviewing a document on a large monitor, blurred colleagues and glass partitions in background, bright natural light, focused and productive expression.
office-general.break: Clean modern open-plan Australian corporate office, natural light flooding in through large windows, tidy desks with monitors, plants and glass partitions, wide shot, no people.
office-general.altHero: Professional using speech recognition software at a modern Australian corporate office workstation
office-general.altBreak: Modern open-plan Australian corporate office with natural light

office-executive.label: Executive / senior professional office
office-executive.hero: Attractive adult male executive aged 40-50, confident and polished, standing at a large executive desk in a private corner office, dictating while reviewing documents, city skyline visible through large windows, warm afternoon light, authoritative and decisive expression.
office-executive.break: Premium executive office interior, large wooden desk with leather chair, city view through floor-to-ceiling windows, clean and minimal, no people, warm directional light.
office-executive.altHero: Executive using voice dictation software in a premium Australian corporate office
office-executive.altBreak: Premium executive office with city views and natural light

government-office.label: Government / public sector office
government-office.hero: Mixed group of adult public sector professionals aged 30-50 in a modern Australian government office, one person dictating while colleagues review a shared document on screen, collaborative and purposeful atmosphere, clean government workplace aesthetic, professional overhead lighting.
government-office.break: Modern Australian government office workspace, clean organised desks with monitors and notepads, professional warm lighting, wide shot, no people.
government-office.altHero: Government professionals using speech recognition software for documentation in an Australian public sector office
government-office.altBreak: Modern Australian government office workspace with organised desks

clinic-desk.label: Clinical desk / no people
clinic-desk.hero: Bright modern clinic reception and administration area, clean white surfaces, laptop and headset on the desk, patient check-in area visible in background, warm clinical lighting, inviting and professional atmosphere, no people.
clinic-desk.break: Close-up of a clinic administration desk, Bluetooth headset beside a laptop, patient folder and pen, warm window light, shallow depth of field, no people.
clinic-desk.altHero: Modern Australian clinic administration area with voice recognition headset
clinic-desk.altBreak: Clinical administration desk with Bluetooth headset and patient folder

student-study.label: Student / university / education
student-study.hero: Attractive adult university student aged 20-26, seated at a modern library study desk, wearing an over-ear headset with boom microphone, dictating while editing text on a laptop, softly blurred bookshelves and study area in background, warm focused desk lamp, positive and focused expression.
student-study.break: Modern university library study area, laptop and headset on a clean desk, bookshelves softly blurred behind, warm focused table lamp, no people.
student-study.altHero: University student using voice recognition software to complete assignments at a modern library desk
student-study.altBreak: University library study desk with voice recognition headset and laptop

box-shot.label: Software / product box shot concept
box-shot.hero: Clean minimal product concept image, sleek software product packaging or interface floating on a white or light gradient background, modern sans-serif typography suggesting a software brand, subtle shadows, premium tech aesthetic, Australian market context.
box-shot.break: Clean flat lay on a white desk surface, laptop showing a clean software interface, headset beside it, small notepad and pen, warm directional light, minimal and premium composition, no people.
box-shot.altHero: Professional speech recognition software product concept on clean white background
box-shot.altBreak: Flat lay of speech recognition software setup with laptop and professional headset

microphone-closeup.label: Microphone / hardware close-up
microphone-closeup.hero: Close-up of a professional desktop USB microphone on a tidy modern desk, shallow depth of field, warm side lighting, blurred monitor and office environment in background, clean premium product photography style.
microphone-closeup.break: Professional desktop microphone on a clean desk beside a laptop, compact and modern design, soft directional light, shallow depth of field, no people.
microphone-closeup.altHero: Professional desktop USB microphone for speech recognition on a modern office desk
microphone-closeup.altBreak: Close-up of professional desktop microphone beside a laptop on a tidy desk

pdf-workflow.label: PDF / document workflow
pdf-workflow.hero: Attractive adult professional aged 35-45, reviewing and annotating documents on a large monitor in a modern Australian office, clean professional document workflow visible on screen, focused and efficient expression, warm office lighting, shallow depth of field.
pdf-workflow.break: Tidy modern desk with printed documents, laptop showing a clean document interface, pen and notebook, warm directional light, no people, professional document management context.
pdf-workflow.altHero: Professional managing PDF documents and workflows on a large monitor in an Australian office
pdf-workflow.altBreak: Modern office desk with document workflow setup and laptop

medical-admin.label: Medical administration / practice manager
medical-admin.hero: Attractive adult female medical practice manager aged 30-45, wearing a professional headset, seated at a busy administration workstation in a modern clinic, managing patient bookings on screen, clinic reception area softly blurred in background, warm clinical lighting, efficient and capable expression.
medical-admin.break: Modern clinic administration area, reception desk with monitor, headset, warm clinical lighting, professional and welcoming, no people.
medical-admin.altHero: Medical practice manager using voice recognition for patient administration in an Australian clinic
medical-admin.altBreak: Modern Australian clinic reception administration desk with headset and patient management system
